name: meme-perp-e2e-test
description: End-to-end production rehearsal using real GMX trading data

scripts.setup: bun run infrastructure/generate-wallets.ts && bun run infrastructure/distribute-bnb.ts && bun run infrastructure/create-test-tokens.ts && bun run infrastructure/seed-liquidity.ts && bun run infrastructure/verify-infrastructure.ts
scripts.test:full: bun run setup && npm run test:modules && npm run test:replay
